user_system_path: The Master Bible is reference authority and issue #196 is the active source-truth cleanup seam. ACTIVE_HANDOFF.md and FOLDERA_BUILD_ORDER.yaml must point at the same issue and the queue file must remain inactive/reference-only.
no_routing_contract: The Agent is forbidden from asking 'What is next?' or 'Should we audit this?'. The Agent must read ACTIVE_HANDOFF.md, FOLDERA_BUILD_ORDER.yaml, and the source-truth map and follow the active issue exactly. The Agent may not deviate from the source-truth cleanup without a signed-off source-truth closeout commit from Brandon.
allowed_files_raw: Current seam is source-truth cleanup only: keep the Master Bible reference-only, point the repo at issue #196, and align source-truth, gate/test files, and root guidance shims without starting product implementation.
forbidden_files_raw: No product/runtime/provider/schema/Supabase/Vercel/live Slack/PR #142/Stripe/auth/landing/dashboard work, no package/dependency changes, no data mutation, no migrations, no live connector fetch, no paid/model call, no fake claims, and no broad cleanup outside the cleanup sweep.
required_browser_proof: Not applicable; deterministic TEST_MODE fixture proof only.
acceptance_condition: ACTIVE_HANDOFF.md, FOLDERA_BUILD_ORDER.yaml, docs/SOURCE_OF_TRUTH_MAP.md, and the shimmed root guidance files all agree that issue #196 is the active source-truth cleanup seam, the Master Bible remains reference authority, and the queue file remains inactive/reference-only. No product/runtime implementation starts in this change.
stop_condition: Stop when the source-truth cleanup and gate/test layer both accept issue #196 as active with no queue activation.
browser_proof_command: not applicable - deterministic TEST_MODE fixture proof only
anti_regression_checks: issue #196 is the active source-truth cleanup seam
The cleanup sweep is the only active seam
No product/runtime implementation starts in the source-truth cleanup change
next_command: Continue the source-truth cleanup branch and keep issue #196 as the only active seam until the PR merges.
